annotations.name: codex-command-approval-explicit-shortcuts
notes: Captured from Codex CLI 0.144.5 before execution in an isolated temporary herdr workspace.
The displayed y shortcut was sent live; Codex confirmed one-time approval and the requested zero-byte file existed afterward.
The displayed p shortcut was sent live for a harmless append prefix; Codex confirmed persistent approval, and repeating the identical command appended a second byte without another blocked prompt.
option_descriptions: Persist approval for commands starting with `touch /private/tmp/notchagent-approval-proof.QD2TKh/once-proof`.
Deny and return feedback to Codex.
option_labels: No, and tell Codex what to do differently
